items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Primary action control. Solid orange brand fill, outline and ghost variants on warm sand surfaces.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: White surface container with a hairline border, rounded corners and a soft warm shadow.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Text field on a sunken sand surface; focus turns the border brand orange with a warm ring.

items.name: theme
items.title: Theme
items.description: Packed warm-sand + sunset-orange tokens, Tailwind theme mapping, base styles, and Lora / Figtree / DM Mono via @fontsource in CSS.

items.name: theme-provider
items.title: Theme Provider
items.description: Light/dark switching for Packed tokens. Toggles .dark on the html element and persists to localStorage. Add themeInitScript to your root layout to avoid a flash.

items.name: utils
items.title: Utils
items.description: The cn() helper for composing Tailwind class names.
